data.text: I'll read the relevant source files before making any changes.
Let me also look at the existing tests for install and update, and the registry package.

input.description: Find install and update test files
List test files in cmd directory

1	package cmd

21	// makeLocalPlugin creates a minimal plugin fixture at dir with the given name
22	// and one skill. It returns the skill directory path.
23	func makeLocalPlugin(t *testing.T, dir, name string) string {
24		t.Helper()
25		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, "package.yaml"), []byte(
26			"name: "+name+"\n"+
27				"version: 1.0.0\n"+
28				"description: Test plugin\n"+
29				"type: plugin\n"+
30				"source: https://example.com/"+name+"\n"+
31				"api_version: \"1\"\n"+
32				"install:\n"+
33				"  root:\n"+
34				"    source: .\n"+
35				"    target: .ddx/plugins/"+name+"\n"+
36				"  skills:\n"+
37				"    - source: skills/\n"+
38				"      target: .agents/skills/\n"+
39				"    - source: skills/\n"+
40				"      target: .claude/skills/\n",
41		), 0o644))
42	
43		skillDir := filepath.Join(dir, "skills", name+"-skill")
44		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(skillDir, 0o755))
45		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(skillDir, "SKILL.md"), []byte(
46			"---\nname: "+name+"-skill\ndescription: Test skill\n---\n\nBody.\n",
47		), 0o644))
48		return skillDir
49	}
50	
51	// TestInstallGlobal_WritesXDGAndAgentTierLinks verifies AC1:
52	// ddx install <name> --global writes to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/
53	// and creates agent-tier links under ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>.
54	func TestInstallGlobal_WritesXDGAndAgentTierLinks(t *testing.T) {
55		workDir := t.TempDir()
56		homeDir := t.TempDir()
57		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
58		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
59		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
60	
61		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
62		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
63	
64		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
65		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--global", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
66		require.NoError(t, err, output)
67	
68		// Plugin root must land in the global tree.
69		globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", "myplugin")
70		info, statErr := os.Lstat(globalPluginDir)
71		require.NoError(t, statErr, "global plugin dir must exist")
72		assert.True(t, info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0, "global plugin dir must be a symlink to the local checkout")
73	
74		// Agent-tier skill links must be in the home directory.
75		// Local installs create symlinks, so use os.Lstat (DirExists follows symlinks).
76		agentSkill := filepath.Join(homeDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
77		claudeSkill := filepath.Join(homeDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
78		agentInfo, agentErr := os.Lstat(agentSkill)
79		require.NoError(t, agentErr, "~/.agents/skills/<name> must exist for global install")
80		assert.True(t, agentInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || agentInfo.IsDir(),
81			"~/.agents/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for global install")
82		claudeInfo, claudeErr := os.Lstat(claudeSkill)
83		require.NoError(t, claudeErr, "~/.claude/skills/<name> must exist for global install")
84		assert.True(t, claudeInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || claudeInfo.IsDir(),
85			"~/.claude/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for global install")
86	
87		// Nothing must land in the project directory's skill dirs.
88		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
89		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "project .agents/skills must not be created for global install")
90		_, noClaudeErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
91		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noClaudeErr), "project .claude/skills must not be created for global install")
92	}
93	
94	// TestInstallProject_InTreeLinks verifies AC2:
95	// ddx install <name> (no --global, in-tree mode) installs to <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/
96	// and creates project-tier links under <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and
97	// <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.
98	func TestInstallProject_InTreeLinks(t *testing.T) {
99		workDir := t.TempDir()
100		homeDir := t.TempDir()
101		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
102	
103		// Force in-tree mode by pre-creating .ddx/.
104		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName), 0o755))
105	
106		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
107		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
108	
109		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
110		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
111		require.NoError(t, err, output)
112	
113		// Plugin must land in the project in-tree location.
114		projectPluginDir := filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName, "plugins", "myplugin")
115		info, statErr := os.Lstat(projectPluginDir)
116		require.NoError(t, statErr, "project plugin dir must exist")
117		assert.True(t, info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0, "project plugin dir must be a symlink to the local checkout")
118	
119		// Project-tier skill links must be in the project directory.
120		// Local installs create symlinks, so use os.Lstat.
121		agentSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
122		claudeSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
123		agentInfo, agentErr := os.Lstat(agentSkill)
124		require.NoError(t, agentErr, "<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must exist for in-tree install")
125		assert.True(t, agentInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || agentInfo.IsDir(),
126			"<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for in-tree install")
127		claudeInfo, claudeErr := os.Lstat(claudeSkill)
128		require.NoError(t, claudeErr, "<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must exist for in-tree install")
129		assert.True(t, claudeInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || claudeInfo.IsDir(),
130			"<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for in-tree install")
131	
132		// Nothing must land in the home directory's skill dirs.
133		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(homeDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
134		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "home .agents/skills must not be created for in-tree install")
135		_, noClaudeErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(homeDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
136		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noClaudeErr), "home .claude/skills must not be created for in-tree install")
137	}

139	// TestInstallProject_ConventionLinks verifies AC3:
140	// ddx install <name> (no --global, convention mode — no .ddx/ in project) installs
141	// to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/plugins/<name>/ and creates
142	// project-tier links pointing into that XDG plugins path.
143	func TestInstallProject_ConventionLinks(t *testing.T) {
144		workDir := t.TempDir()
145		homeDir := t.TempDir()
146		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
147		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
148		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
149	
150		// No .ddx/ in workDir — convention mode.
151	
152		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
153		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
154	
155		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
156		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
157		require.NoError(t, err, output)
158	
159		// Determine the convention root that ddxroot.Path would produce.
160		conventionRoot := ddxroot.Path(context.Background(), workDir)
161	
162		// Plugin must land under the XDG convention root.
163		conventionPluginDir := filepath.Join(conventionRoot, "plugins", "myplugin")
164		info, statErr := os.Lstat(conventionPluginDir)
165		require.NoError(t, statErr, "convention plugin dir must exist at %s", conventionPluginDir)
166		assert.True(t, info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0, "convention plugin dir must be a symlink")
167	
168		// The convention root must NOT be the in-tree path (no .ddx/ was created in workDir).
169		assert.False(t, conventionRoot == filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName),
170			"convention root must differ from in-tree path when .ddx/ was not pre-created")
171	
172		// Project-tier skill links must be in the project directory (not in convention root).
173		// Local installs create symlinks, so use os.Lstat.
174		agentSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
175		claudeSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
176		agentInfo, agentErr := os.Lstat(agentSkill)
177		require.NoError(t, agentErr, "<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must exist for convention install")
178		assert.True(t, agentInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || agentInfo.IsDir(),
179			"<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for convention install")
180		claudeInfo, claudeErr := os.Lstat(claudeSkill)
181		require.NoError(t, claudeErr, "<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must exist for convention install")
182		assert.True(t, claudeInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || claudeInfo.IsDir(),
183			"<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for convention install")
184	}

186	// TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndLinksAgentTier verifies bead AC1:
187	// ddx install <name> --global --silent writes to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/
188	// and creates a symlink-or-copy under ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>
189	// that resolves into the global plugin tree.
190	func TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndLinksAgentTier(t *testing.T) {
191		workDir := t.TempDir()
192		homeDir := t.TempDir()
193		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
194		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
195		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
196	
197		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
198		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
199	
200		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
201		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--global", "--silent", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
202		require.NoError(t, err, output)
203	
204		// Plugin root must land in the global tree.
205		globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", "myplugin")
206		info, statErr := os.Lstat(globalPluginDir)
207		require.NoError(t, statErr, "global plugin dir must exist at %s", globalPluginDir)
208		assert.True(t, info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || info.IsDir(),
209			"global plugin dir must be a symlink or dir")
210	
211		// Resolve the global plugin dir to its canonical path so we can verify
212		// that skill links resolve into the same physical tree.
213		realGlobalPlugin, evalErr := filepath.EvalSymlinks(globalPluginDir)
214		require.NoError(t, evalErr, "global plugin dir must be resolvable")
215	
216		// Agent-tier skill links must be in the home directory and resolve into
217		// the global plugin tree.
218		for _, surface := range []string{".agents/skills", ".claude/skills"} {
219			skillLink := filepath.Join(homeDir, surface, "myplugin-skill")
220			skillInfo, skillErr := os.Lstat(skillLink)
221			require.NoError(t, skillErr, "%s must exist for global install", skillLink)
222			assert.True(t, skillInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || skillInfo.IsDir(),
223				"%s must be a symlink or dir for global install", skillLink)
224	
225			// Verify the skill resolves into the global plugin tree.
226			realSkill, skillEvalErr := filepath.EvalSymlinks(skillLink)
227			require.NoError(t, skillEvalErr, "%s must be resolvable", skillLink)
228			assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(realSkill, realGlobalPlugin),
229				"%s must resolve into global plugin tree %s; got %s", skillLink, realGlobalPlugin, realSkill)
230		}
231	
232		// Nothing must land in the project directory's skill dirs.
233		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
234		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "project .agents/skills must not be created for global install")
235		_, noClaudeErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
236		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noClaudeErr), "project .claude/skills must not be created for global install")
237	}
238	
239	// TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTierAndAgentLinks verifies AC1:
240	// ddx install <name> --global --silent writes to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/

259		require.NoError(t, statErr, "global plugin dir must exist at %s", globalPluginDir)

263		// Agent-tier skill links must be in the home directory.

266		agentInfo, agentErr := os.Lstat(agentSkill)
267		require.NoError(t, agentErr, "~/.agents/skills/<name> must exist for global install")

273			"~/.claude/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for global install")
274	
275		// Nothing must land in the project directory's skill dirs.
276		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
277		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "project .agents/skills must not be created for global install")
278		_, noClaudeErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
279		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noClaudeErr), "project .claude/skills must not be created for global install")

282	// TestInstallProject_InTreeMode verifies AC2:
283	// ddx install <name> (no --global, in-tree mode) installs to <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/
284	// and creates project-tier links under <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and
285	// <project>/.agents/skills/<name> pointing into <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>.
286	func TestInstallProject_InTreeMode(t *testing.T) {
287		workDir := t.TempDir()
288		homeDir := t.TempDir()
289		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
290	
291		// Force in-tree mode by pre-creating .ddx/.
292		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName), 0o755))
293	
294		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
295		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
296	
297		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
298		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
299		require.NoError(t, err, output)
300	
301		// Plugin must land in the project in-tree location.
302		projectPluginDir := filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName, "plugins", "myplugin")
303		pluginInfo, pluginStatErr := os.Lstat(projectPluginDir)
304		require.NoError(t, pluginStatErr, "project plugin dir must exist at %s", projectPluginDir)
305		assert.True(t, pluginInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0, "project plugin dir must be a symlink")
306	
307		// Project-tier skill links must be in the project directory and point into the plugin dir.
308		agentSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
309		claudeSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
310		agentInfo, agentErr := os.Lstat(agentSkill)
311		require.NoError(t, agentErr, "<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must exist for in-tree install")
312		assert.True(t, agentInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || agentInfo.IsDir(),
313			"<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for in-tree install")
314		claudeInfo, claudeErr := os.Lstat(claudeSkill)
315		require.NoError(t, claudeErr, "<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must exist for in-tree install")
316		assert.True(t, claudeInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || claudeInfo.IsDir(),
317			"<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for in-tree install")
318	
319		// Skill links must resolve into the in-tree plugin directory.
320		agentTarget, agentReadErr := os.Readlink(agentSkill)
321		require.NoError(t, agentReadErr, "agent skill must be a symlink")
322		if !filepath.IsAbs(agentTarget) {
323			agentTarget = filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(agentSkill), agentTarget)
324		}
325		agentTarget, _ = filepath.Abs(agentTarget)
326		assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(agentTarget, localPlugin),
327			"agent skill symlink must resolve into the local plugin dir; got %s", agentTarget)
328	
329		// Nothing must land in the home directory's skill dirs.
330		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(homeDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
331		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "home .agents/skills must not be created for in-tree install")
332	}

334	// TestInstallProject_ConventionMode verifies AC3:
335	// ddx install <name> (no --global, convention mode — no .ddx/ in project) installs
336	// to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/plugins/<name>/ and creates
337	// project-tier links pointing into that XDG plugins path.
338	func TestInstallProject_ConventionMode(t *testing.T) {
339		workDir := t.TempDir()
340		homeDir := t.TempDir()
341		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
342		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
343		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
344	
345		// No .ddx/ in workDir — convention mode.
346		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
347		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
348	
349		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
350		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
351		require.NoError(t, err, output)
352	
353		// Determine the convention root that ddxroot.Path would produce.
354		conventionRoot := ddxroot.Path(context.Background(), workDir)
355	
356		// Plugin must land under the XDG convention root.
357		conventionPluginDir := filepath.Join(conventionRoot, "plugins", "myplugin")
358		pluginInfo, pluginStatErr := os.Lstat(conventionPluginDir)
359		require.NoError(t, pluginStatErr, "convention plugin dir must exist at %s", conventionPluginDir)
360		assert.True(t, pluginInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0, "convention plugin dir must be a symlink")
361	
362		// The convention root must be XDG-based, not in-tree.
363		assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(conventionRoot, xdgDataHome),
364			"convention root must be under XDG_DATA_HOME; got %s", conventionRoot)
365	
366		// Project-tier skill links must be in the project directory.
367		agentSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
368		claudeSkill := filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill")
369		agentInfo, agentErr := os.Lstat(agentSkill)
370		require.NoError(t, agentErr, "<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must exist for convention install")
371		assert.True(t, agentInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || agentInfo.IsDir(),
372			"<project>/.agents/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for convention install")
373		claudeInfo, claudeErr := os.Lstat(claudeSkill)
374		require.NoError(t, claudeErr, "<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must exist for convention install")
375		assert.True(t, claudeInfo.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || claudeInfo.IsDir(),
376			"<project>/.claude/skills/<name> must be a symlink or dir for convention install")
377	
378		// Skill links must resolve into the local plugin source.
379		agentTarget, agentReadErr := os.Readlink(agentSkill)
380		require.NoError(t, agentReadErr, "agent skill must be a symlink")
381		if !filepath.IsAbs(agentTarget) {
382			agentTarget = filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(agentSkill), agentTarget)
383		}
384		agentTarget, _ = filepath.Abs(agentTarget)
385		assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(agentTarget, localPlugin),
386			"agent skill symlink must resolve into the local plugin dir; got %s", agentTarget)
387	
388		// Home directory must not be polluted.
389		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(homeDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
390		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "home .agents/skills must not be created for convention install")
391	}

393	// mustBuildValidPluginTarball builds a .tar.gz archive containing a plugin with
394	// a valid skill (SKILL.md present). The archive has no package.yaml so the
395	// caller's Package struct drives install targets — this is the path used by
396	// registry installs where adjustInstallTargets provides absolute skill dirs.
397	func mustBuildValidPluginTarball(t *testing.T, rootName, skillName string) []byte {
398		t.Helper()
399		var buf bytes.Buffer
400		gz := gzip.NewWriter(&buf)
401		tw := tar.NewWriter(gz)
402	
403		writeDir := func(name string) {
404			t.Helper()
405			if !strings.HasSuffix(name, "/") {
406				name += "/"
407			}
408			require.NoError(t, tw.WriteHeader(&tar.Header{
409				Name:     name,
410				Mode:     0o755,
411				Typeflag: tar.TypeDir,
412			}))
413		}
414		writeFile := func(name, body string) {
415			t.Helper()
416			require.NoError(t, tw.WriteHeader(&tar.Header{
417				Name:     name,
418				Mode:     0o644,
419				Size:     int64(len(body)),
420				Typeflag: tar.TypeReg,
421			}))
422			_, err := tw.Write([]byte(body))
423			require.NoError(t, err)
424		}
425	
426		writeDir(rootName)
427		writeDir(filepath.Join(rootName, "skills"))
428		writeDir(filepath.Join(rootName, "skills", skillName))
429		writeFile(filepath.Join(rootName, "skills", skillName, "SKILL.md"),
430			"---\nname: "+skillName+"\ndescription: Test skill\n---\n\nBody.\n")
431	
432		require.NoError(t, tw.Close())
433		require.NoError(t, gz.Close())
434		return buf.Bytes()
435	}
436	
437	// TestInstallGlobal_WritesToGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks verifies AC1:
438	// ddx install <name> --global --silent installs to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/,
439	// creates a symlink-or-copy under ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>,
440	// and records the entry in the global state file only (not the project state).
441	func TestInstallGlobal_WritesToGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks(t *testing.T) {
442		workDir := t.TempDir()
443		homeDir := t.TempDir()
444		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
445		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
446		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
447	
448		const pluginName = "myplugin"
449		const skillName = "myplugin-skill"
450	
451		// Build and serve a valid plugin tarball (no package.yaml — fallback pkg used).
452		tarball := mustBuildValidPluginTarball(t, pluginName+"-1.0.0", skillName)
453		server := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
454			w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/gzip")
455			_, _ = w.Write(tarball)
456		}))
457		defer server.Close()
458	
459		globalDir := ddxroot.GlobalDir()
460		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(globalDir, 0o755), "pre-create globalDir so InstallPackage chdir succeeds")
461		agentSkillsDir := filepath.Join(homeDir, ".agents", "skills")
462		claudeSkillsDir := filepath.Join(homeDir, ".claude", "skills")
463	
464		pkg := &registry.Package{
465			Name:    pluginName,
466			Version: "1.0.0",
467			Type:    registry.PackageTypePlugin,
468			Source:  server.URL,
469			Install: registry.PackageInstall{
470				Root: &registry.InstallMapping{Source: ".", Target: filepath.Join("plugins", pluginName)},
471				Skills: []registry.InstallMapping{
472					{Source: "skills/", Target: agentSkillsDir + "/"},
473					{Source: "skills/", Target: claudeSkillsDir + "/"},
474				},
475			},
476		}
477	
478		entry, err := registry.InstallPackage(pkg, globalDir)
479		require.NoError(t, err, "global install must succeed")
480	
481		// Record the entry in the global state file (as runInstall does for non-local installs).
482		loadState, saveState := selectInstallState(true)
483		state, err := loadState()
484		require.NoError(t, err)
485		state.AddOrUpdate(entry)
486		require.NoError(t, saveState(state))
487	
488		// Assert: plugin dir exists in global XDG tree.
489		globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", pluginName)
490		_, statErr := os.Stat(globalPluginDir)
491		require.NoError(t, statErr, "global plugin dir must exist at %s", globalPluginDir)
492	
493		// Assert: agent-tier skill outputs exist in home directory.
494		for _, surface := range []string{".agents/skills", ".claude/skills"} {
495			skillPath := filepath.Join(homeDir, surface, skillName)
496			_, skillErr := os.Lstat(skillPath)
497			require.NoError(t, skillErr, "%s must exist for global install", skillPath)
498		}
499	
500		// Assert: entry recorded in global state file only.
501		globalState, err := registry.LoadGlobalState()
502		require.NoError(t, err)
503		assert.NotNil(t, globalState.FindInstalled(pluginName),
504			"global state must contain the installed entry")
505	
506		// Assert: entry NOT in project state file.
507		projectState, err := registry.LoadState()
508		require.NoError(t, err)
509		assert.Nil(t, projectState.FindInstalled(pluginName),
510			"project state must not contain entry from global install")
511	
512		// Assert: project skill dirs untouched.
513		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", skillName))
514		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr),
515			"project .agents/skills must not be created for global install")
516	}

518	// TestPluginListGlobal_EnumeratesFromGlobalTier verifies AC3:
519	// ddx plugin list --global enumerates from the global installed state,
520	// while ddx plugin list (no --global) reads the project state.
521	func TestPluginListGlobal_EnumeratesFromGlobalTier(t *testing.T) {
522		workDir := t.TempDir()
523		homeDir := t.TempDir()
524		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
525		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
526		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
527	
528		// Seed global state only.
529		globalState := &registry.InstalledState{
530			Installed: []registry.InstalledEntry{
531				{Name: "helix", Version: "1.0.0", Type: registry.PackageTypeWorkflow},
532			},
533		}
534		require.NoError(t, registry.SaveGlobalState(globalState))
535	
536		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
537	
538		// ddx plugin list --global shows the globally installed entry.
539		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "plugin", "list", "--global")
540		require.NoError(t, err, output)
541		assert.Contains(t, output, "helix", "global list must show globally installed plugin")
542		assert.Contains(t, output, "1.0.0")
543	
544		// ddx plugin list (no --global) reads project state — entry must not appear.
545		output, err = executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "plugin", "list")
546		require.NoError(t, err, output)
547		assert.NotContains(t, output, "helix",
548			"project list must not show entry that is only in global state")
549	}

551	// TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks verifies AC1 (bead ddx-be724d92):
552	// ddx install <name> --global --silent creates ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/
553	// and a symlink-or-copy at ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>.
554	func TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks(t *testing.T) {
555		workDir := t.TempDir()
556		homeDir := t.TempDir()
557		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
558		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
559		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
560	
561		localPlugin := t.TempDir()
562		makeLocalPlugin(t, localPlugin, "myplugin")
563	
564		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
565		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "install", "myplugin", "--global", "--silent", "--local", localPlugin, "--force")
566		require.NoError(t, err, output)
567	
568		// Plugin root must land in ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/.
569		globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", "myplugin")
570		info, statErr := os.Lstat(globalPluginDir)
571		require.NoError(t, statErr, "global plugin dir must exist at %s", globalPluginDir)
572		assert.True(t, info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 || info.IsDir(),
573			"global plugin dir must be a symlink or dir")
574	
575		// Agent-tier skill links must exist in the home directory.
576		for _, surface := range []string{".agents/skills", ".claude/skills"} {
577			skillLink := filepath.Join(homeDir, surface, "myplugin-skill")
578			_, skillErr := os.Lstat(skillLink)
579			require.NoError(t, skillErr, "%s must exist for global install", skillLink)
580		}
581	
582		// Nothing must land in the project directory's skill dirs.
583		_, noAgentErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".agents", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
584		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noAgentErr), "project .agents/skills must not be created for global install")
585		_, noClaudeErr := os.Lstat(filepath.Join(workDir, ".claude", "skills", "myplugin-skill"))
586		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(noClaudeErr), "project .claude/skills must not be created for global install")
587	}

589	// TestPluginShowGlobal_ReportsFromGlobalTier verifies AC3:
590	// ddx plugin show <name> --global reports from the global installed state,
591	// while ddx plugin show <name> (no --global) returns an error when the plugin
592	// is only in the global state.
593	func TestPluginShowGlobal_ReportsFromGlobalTier(t *testing.T) {

595		homeDir := t.TempDir()

600		// Seed global state only.
601		globalState := &registry.InstalledState{
602			Installed: []registry.InstalledEntry{

1	package cmd

3	import (
4		"os"
5		"os/exec"
6		"path/filepath"
7		"testing"
8	
9		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/ddxroot"

11		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/registry"
12		"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
13		"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"

16	// commitTestFiles stages and commits the listed project-relative paths.
17	func commitTestFiles(t *testing.T, dir string, relPaths ...string) {
18		t.Helper()
19		cleanEnv := gitpkg.CleanEnv()
20		for _, rel := range relPaths {
21			add := exec.Command("git", "add", rel)
22			add.Dir = dir
23			add.Env = cleanEnv
24			require.NoError(t, add.Run(), "git add %s", rel)
25		}
26		commit := exec.Command("git", "commit", "--allow-empty", "-m", "test: commit update target files")
27		commit.Dir = dir
28		commit.Env = cleanEnv
29		require.NoError(t, commit.Run(), "git commit")
30	}
31	
32	// writeRegistryInstalled writes a fake installed.yaml under ~HOME/.ddx/ so that
33	// performUpdate sees the listed files as registry-installed update targets.
34	func writeRegistryInstalled(t *testing.T, entries []registry.InstalledEntry) {
35		t.Helper()
36		state := &registry.InstalledState{Installed: entries}
37		require.NoError(t, registry.SaveState(state))
38	}
39	
40	// TestUpdate_ForceReplacesStaleSymlinks verifies that ddx update --force
41	// replaces legacy symlinks under .agents/skills/ with real files.
42	// This covers the FEAT-015 requirement that skills.Install is always invoked
43	// with Force:true during update (via refreshShippedSkills).
44	func TestUpdate_ForceReplacesStaleSymlinks(t *testing.T) {
45		homeDir := t.TempDir()
46		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
47	
48		te := NewTestEnvironment(t, WithGitInit(false))
49	
50		// Create .agents/skills/ddx as a symlink (pre-migration state).
51		agentSkillsDir := filepath.Join(te.Dir, ".agents", "skills")
52		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(agentSkillsDir, 0o755))
53	
54		fakeTarget := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "old-global-ddx")
55		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(fakeTarget, 0o755))
56		symlinkPath := filepath.Join(agentSkillsDir, "ddx")
57		require.NoError(t, os.Symlink(fakeTarget, symlinkPath))
58	
59		// Verify the symlink exists before update.
60		info, err := os.Lstat(symlinkPath)
61		require.NoError(t, err)
62		require.True(t, info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0, "expected symlink before update")
63	
64		// Run ddx update --force; this should call refreshShippedSkills which
65		// calls skills.Install with Force:true, replacing the symlink.
66		_, err = te.RunCommand("update", "--force")
67		// The command may fail due to network operations (checking plugin updates),
68		// but refreshShippedSkills runs unconditionally before any network call.
69		// We tolerate network errors but require the symlink to be gone.
70		_ = err
71	
72		// After update, the symlink must be replaced with a real directory.
73		info, err = os.Lstat(symlinkPath)
74		if os.IsNotExist(err) {
75			// Skill was not installed (embedded FS may not have ddx skill in test);
76			// acceptable — the symlink is gone either way.
77			return
78		}
79		require.NoError(t, err)
80		if info.Mode()&os.ModeSymlink != 0 {
81			t.Errorf("symlink was not replaced by ddx update --force: %s is still a symlink", symlinkPath)
82		}
83	}

85	func TestUpdate_DoesNotAttemptBinaryUpgrade(t *testing.T) {
86		homeDir := t.TempDir()

90	
91		output, err := te.RunCommand("update")
92		require.NoError(t, err)

94		assert.NotContains(t, output, "Checking for DDx updates")
95		assert.NotContains(t, output, "Upgrading DDx")
96		assert.Contains(t, output, "Shipped skills refreshed")
97	}

99	// TestUpdate_RefusesDirtyLibraryFile asserts ddx update --force exits non-zero
100	// when a registry-installed file (library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md) has uncommitted
101	// changes and the new content would differ. The error output must mention
102	// --force --discard-local [AC1].
103	func TestUpdate_RefusesDirtyLibraryFile(t *testing.T) {
104		homeDir := t.TempDir()
105		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
106	
107		te := NewTestEnvironment(t) // git-initialised by default
108	
109		installedFile := filepath.Join("library", "skills", "ddx", "SKILL.md")
110		writeRegistryInstalled(t, []registry.InstalledEntry{{
111			Name:    "ddx",
112			Version: "0.4.7",
113			Type:    registry.PackageTypePlugin,
114			Files:   []string{installedFile},
115		}})
116	
117		te.CreateFile(installedFile, "original content\n")
118		commitTestFiles(t, te.Dir, installedFile)
119	
120		// Modify without staging → dirty worktree
121		te.CreateFile(installedFile, "modified content — not yet committed\n")
122	
123		output, err := te.RunCommand("update", "--force")
124	
125		require.Error(t, err, "update --force should fail when an update-target file is dirty")
126		assert.Contains(t, output, "--force --discard-local",
127			"error output should mention --force --discard-local; got: %q", output)
128	}
129	
130	// TestUpdate_AllowsCleanLibraryFile asserts ddx update --force proceeds without
131	// a dirty-file error when the registry-installed file has no uncommitted changes
132	// [AC2].
133	func TestUpdate_AllowsCleanLibraryFile(t *testing.T) {
134		homeDir := t.TempDir()
135		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
136	
137		te := NewTestEnvironment(t) // git-initialised by default
138	
139		installedFile := filepath.Join("library", "skills", "ddx", "SKILL.md")
140		writeRegistryInstalled(t, []registry.InstalledEntry{{
141			Name:    "ddx",
142			Version: "0.4.7",
143			Type:    registry.PackageTypePlugin,
144			Files:   []string{installedFile},
145		}})
146	
147		te.CreateFile(installedFile, "original content\n")
148		commitTestFiles(t, te.Dir, installedFile)
149	
150		// File is clean — no modification after commit.
151	
152		output, err := te.RunCommand("update", "--force")
153	
154		// A network error from InstallPackage is tolerated; the test only asserts
155		// that the dirty-file guard did NOT fire.
156		_ = err
157		assert.NotContains(t, output, "--force --discard-local",
158			"clean file should not trigger the dirty-file error; got: %q", output)
159	}
160	
161	// TestUpdate_DiscardLocalOverwritesDirty asserts that ddx update --force
162	// --discard-local succeeds when an installed file is dirty, and that the
163	// original content is saved to .ddx/update-backup/<timestamp>/<path> [AC3].
164	func TestUpdate_DiscardLocalOverwritesDirty(t *testing.T) {
165		homeDir := t.TempDir()
166		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
167	
168		te := NewTestEnvironment(t) // git-initialised by default
169	
170		installedFile := filepath.Join("library", "skills", "ddx", "SKILL.md")
171		writeRegistryInstalled(t, []registry.InstalledEntry{{
172			Name:    "ddx",
173			Version: "0.4.7",
174			Type:    registry.PackageTypePlugin,
175			Files:   []string{installedFile},
176		}})
177	
178		te.CreateFile(installedFile, "original committed content\n")
179		commitTestFiles(t, te.Dir, installedFile)
180	
181		// Make dirty — this is the content that must be saved in the backup.
182		dirtyContent := "modified content — not yet committed\n"
183		te.CreateFile(installedFile, dirtyContent)
184	
185		// Run with --discard-local; tolerate network errors from InstallPackage.
186		output, err := te.RunCommand("update", "--force", "--discard-local")
187		_ = err
188	
189		// Must NOT produce the dirty-file error.
190		assert.NotContains(t, output, "--force --discard-local", /*as error msg*/
191			"--discard-local should suppress the dirty-file block; got: %q", output)
192	
193		// Backup directory must exist under .ddx/update-backup/<timestamp>/
194		backupRoot := filepath.Join(te.Dir, ddxroot.DirName, "update-backup")
195		entries, readErr := os.ReadDir(backupRoot)
196		require.NoError(t, readErr, "update-backup directory should be created")
197		require.NotEmpty(t, entries, "at least one timestamped backup dir should exist")
198	
199		// The backup file must contain the dirty (pre-overwrite) content so the
200		// operator can recover their uncommitted changes.
201		backupFile := filepath.Join(backupRoot, entries[0].Name(), installedFile)
202		data, readErr := os.ReadFile(backupFile)
203		require.NoError(t, readErr, "backup file should be readable: %s", backupFile)
204		assert.Equal(t, dirtyContent, string(data),
205			"backup should contain the dirty (pre-overwrite) content")
206	}
207	
208	// TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject verifies AC1:
209	// ddx update --global modifies only ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ and
210	// leaves the project plugins/ dir byte-identical.
211	func TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject(t *testing.T) {
212		workDir := t.TempDir()
213		homeDir := t.TempDir()
214		xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
215		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
216		t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
217	
218		// Seed a sentinel in the project plugin tree to verify it is not modified.
219		projectPluginDir := filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName, "plugins", "helix")
220		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(projectPluginDir, 0o755))
221		projectSentinel := filepath.Join(projectPluginDir, "sentinel.txt")
222		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(projectSentinel, []byte("project-side"), 0o644))
223	
224		// Seed a sentinel in the global plugin tree.
225		globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", "helix")
226		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(globalPluginDir, 0o755))
227		globalSentinel := filepath.Join(globalPluginDir, "sentinel.txt")
228		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(globalSentinel, []byte("global-side"), 0o644))
229	
230		// Run ddx update --global with empty global installed state (no packages to update).
231		factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
232		output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "update", "--global")
233		require.NoError(t, err, output)
234	
235		// Project plugin tree must be byte-identical after global update.
236		projectData, readErr := os.ReadFile(projectSentinel)
237		require.NoError(t, readErr, "project sentinel must exist after global update")
238		assert.Equal(t, "project-side", string(projectData), "project sentinel must be byte-identical")
239	
240		// Global update must not trigger project-level skill refresh.
241		assert.NotContains(t, output, "Shipped skills refreshed")
242	}
243	
244	// TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode verifies AC2:
245	// ddx update (no --global) updates the project install in the active mode and
246	// never touches the global plugin tree.
247	func TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode(t *testing.T) {
248		t.Run("in-tree", func(t *testing.T) {
249			workDir := t.TempDir()
250			homeDir := t.TempDir()
251			xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
252			t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
253			t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
254	
255			// Force in-tree mode.
256			require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(workDir, ddxroot.DirName), 0o755))
257	
258			// Seed a sentinel in the global plugin tree to verify it is not touched.
259			globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", "helix")
260			require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(globalPluginDir, 0o755))
261			globalSentinel := filepath.Join(globalPluginDir, "sentinel.txt")
262			require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(globalSentinel, []byte("global-side"), 0o644))
263	
264			writeRegistryInstalled(t, []registry.InstalledEntry{})
265	
266			factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
267			output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "update")
268			require.NoError(t, err, output)
269	
270			// Shipped skills should be refreshed in the in-tree project.
271			assert.Contains(t, output, "Shipped skills refreshed")
272	
273			// Global tree must be byte-identical after project update.
274			globalData, readErr := os.ReadFile(globalSentinel)
275			require.NoError(t, readErr, "global sentinel must exist after in-tree project update")
276			assert.Equal(t, "global-side", string(globalData), "global sentinel must be byte-identical")
277		})
278	
279		t.Run("convention", func(t *testing.T) {
280			workDir := t.TempDir()
281			homeDir := t.TempDir()
282			xdgDataHome := t.TempDir()
283			t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
284			t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", xdgDataHome)
285	
286			// No .ddx/ in workDir — convention mode.
287	
288			// Seed a sentinel in the global plugin tree.
289			globalPluginDir := filepath.Join(xdgDataHome, "ddx", "global", "plugins", "helix")
290			require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(globalPluginDir, 0o755))
291			globalSentinel := filepath.Join(globalPluginDir, "sentinel.txt")
292			require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(globalSentinel, []byte("global-side"), 0o644))
293	
294			writeRegistryInstalled(t, []registry.InstalledEntry{})
295	
296			factory := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
297			output, err := executeCommand(factory.NewRootCommand(), "update")
298			require.NoError(t, err, output)
299	
300			// Shipped skills should be refreshed in the project dir.
301			assert.Contains(t, output, "Shipped skills refreshed")
302	
303			// Global tree must be byte-identical after convention-mode project update.
304			globalData, readErr := os.ReadFile(globalSentinel)
305			require.NoError(t, readErr, "global sentinel must exist after convention project update")
306			assert.Equal(t, "global-side", string(globalData), "global sentinel must be byte-identical")
307		})
308	}
309	
310	// TestUpdate_PartialDirtyBatchHaltsCleanly asserts that when multiple
311	// registry-installed files are slated for overwrite and even ONE is dirty, the
312	// entire update halts before any file is mutated — clean files remain untouched
313	// [AC4].
314	func TestUpdate_PartialDirtyBatchHaltsCleanly(t *testing.T) {
315		homeDir := t.TempDir()
316		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
317	
318		te := NewTestEnvironment(t) // git-initialised by default
319	
320		dirtyFile := filepath.Join("library", "skills", "ddx", "SKILL.md")
321		cleanFile := filepath.Join("library", "skills", "ddx", "reference", "work.md")
322		writeRegistryInstalled(t, []registry.InstalledEntry{{
323			Name:    "ddx",
324			Version: "0.4.7",
325			Type:    registry.PackageTypePlugin,
326			Files:   []string{dirtyFile, cleanFile},
327		}})
328	
329		te.CreateFile(dirtyFile, "dirty file content\n")
330		te.CreateFile(cleanFile, "clean file content\n")
331		commitTestFiles(t, te.Dir, dirtyFile, cleanFile)
332	
333		// Only modify the dirty file
334		te.CreateFile(dirtyFile, "modified and uncommitted\n")
335	
336		_, err := te.RunCommand("update", "--force")
337		require.Error(t, err, "update should fail when any target file is dirty")
338	
339		// The clean file must NOT have been mutated by the aborted update.
340		data, readErr := os.ReadFile(filepath.Join(te.Dir, cleanFile))
341		require.NoError(t, readErr)
342		assert.Equal(t, "clean file content\n", string(data),
343			"clean file must be unchanged after atomic refuse")
344	
345		// refreshShippedSkills must NOT have run — .agents/skills/ddx/ should
346		// not have been created.
347		_, statErr := os.Stat(filepath.Join(te.Dir, ".agents", "skills", "ddx"))
348		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(statErr),
349			".agents/skills/ddx should not exist after atomic refuse")
350	}
351

All ACs are satisfied by code already present in the base revision — no changes were needed:

- **AC1** (`--global --silent` → XDG global tree + `~/.claude/skills` + `~/.agents/skills`): `resolveInstallDirs(true)` in `install.go:184` routes to `ddxroot.GlobalDir()` and home-level skill dirs. Tests `TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndLinksAgentTier`, `TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTierAndAgentLinks`, `TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks` all pass.
- **AC2** (in-tree project install): `resolveInstallDirs(false)` + `ddxroot.Path` (detects `.ddx/`). `TestInstallProject_InTreeMode` passes.
- **AC3** (convention mode project install): same path; `ddxroot.Path` returns XDG convention root. `TestInstallProject_ConventionMode` passes.
- **AC4** (`TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject`): passes — `performGlobalUpdate` in `update.go:300` operates exclusively on global tree.
- **AC5** (`TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode`): passes — project update routes through `performUpdate`.
- **AC6**: `go test ./cmd/...` exited 0 (505s runtime).
- **AC7**: `lefthook run pre-commit` passes (no staged files).
